name: sanguosha-html
description: 三国杀 1v1 browser game served as native ES modules from a static GitHub Pages site. v10: data-driven skill/card/equipment metadata, pause/resume player-choice framework, unified response (无懈/闪/杀) dispatch. 31 implemented skills (7 active) verified against official-pack specs. Post-v10 audit fixed rule-compliance gaps: 濒死 negative-HP/multi-桃 rescue, 无懈可击 coverage, 八卦 vs 万箭, 朱雀 card-identity.

scripts.test: for f in tests/*.mjs; do printf '\n===== %s\n' "$f"; node "$f" || exit 1; done
